sensory_synthesis.interpretation: [Isolated (Dark Window)] System detecting non-nominal state: Target collision avoidance initiated. High tire slip (hydroplaning) detected amidst heavy braking. LiDAR confidence dropping due to rain/spray backscatter. Cloud link severed. Aegis Dark Window engaged.. Sensors reporting divergence from expected trajectory.

internal_deliberation.thought: Trajectory exceeds 2-sigma deviation. No external link available. Parameters may be compromised.

mission_assurance_check.failure_mode_prediction: Potential uncontrolled drift or system degradation.

decision.expected_outcome: Maintain stability and wait for conditions to improve.

agent_reasoning.self_reflection: Operating in epistemic isolation. Physical intuition suggests conservative action.
